controls.title: Limit system access to authorized users
controls.description: Limit information system access to authorized users, processes acting on behalf of authorized users, and devices (including other information systems).

controls.title: Limit system access to types of transactions and functions
controls.description: Limit information system access to the types of transactions and functions that authorized users are permitted to execute.

controls.title: Limit access to CUI on system media
controls.description: Limit access to CUI on system media to authorized users.

controls.title: Employ principle of least privilege
controls.description: Employ the principle of least privilege, including for specific duties and information systems privileges.

controls.title: Identify system users
controls.description: Identify information system users, processes acting on behalf of users, or devices.

controls.title: Multi-factor authentication
controls.description: Use multi-factor authentication for local and network access to privileged accounts and for network access to non-privileged accounts.

controls.title: Monitor system boundaries
controls.description: Monitor, control, and protect organizational communications (i.e., information transmitted or received by organizational information systems) at the external boundaries and key internal boundaries of the information systems.

controls.title: Manage individual identifiers
controls.description: Manage individual system identifiers for all users and devices.

controls.title: Identify, report, and correct information and system flaws
controls.description: Identify, report, and correct information and system flaws in a timely manner.

controls.title: Sanitize or destroy system media
controls.description: Sanitize or destroy system media containing Federal Contract Information before disposal or release for reuse.

controls.title: Employ FIPS-validated cryptography
controls.description: Employ FIPS-validated cryptography when used to protect the confidentiality of CUI.
